name: Production Site B
description: A state-of-the-art manufacturing facility spanning over 500,000 sq ft, specializing in high-performance and specialty tires. It incorporates advanced robotics and AI-driven quality control systems, with a daily output capacity of 15,000 units. The site emphasizes lean manufacturing principles and energy efficiency.

full_text: Production Site B - A state-of-the-art manufacturing facility spanning over 500,000 sq ft, specializing in high-performance and specialty tires. It incorporates advanced robotics and AI-driven quality control systems, with a daily output capacity of 15,000 units. The site emphasizes lean manufacturing principles and energy efficiency.

name: TUM 2
description: An advanced diagnostic station that measures radial and lateral force variations, conicity, and ply steer of finished tires. This crucial step ensures ride comfort and handling performance by identifying and flagging out-of-spec tires before shipment, utilizing laser scanning and load cell technology.

name: Smart Tire Machine 1
description: High-speed discrete automation asset that assembles 'Green Tires' from uncured rubber components. Process Type: Discrete, Cycle-based (~40s). Key Physics: Tension control and mechanical alignment determine tire uniformity. Includes integrated sensors for real-time process monitoring.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Tire Production Line 1/Smart Tire Machine 1
full_text: Smart Tire Machine 1 - High-speed discrete automation asset that assembles 'Green Tires' from uncured rubber components. Process Type: Discrete, Cycle-based (~40s). Key Physics: Tension control and mechanical alignment determine tire uniformity. Includes integrated sensors for real-time process monitoring.

description: Performs precise measurements of tire force variation and imbalance. Ensures every tire meets stringent uniformity and quality standards before final shipment.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site B/Tire Production Line 3/TUM P2-L3
full_text: TUM P2-L3 - Performs precise measurements of tire force variation and imbalance. Ensures every tire meets stringent uniformity and quality standards before final shipment.

name: Mixer Gamma
description: A Banbury-type internal mixer, specifically designed for blending complex rubber compounds with various additives. Operates under high shear and temperature, crucial for achieving desired material properties. Features advanced sensor arrays for real-time monitoring of temperature, pressure, and power consumption, enabling precise control over the mixing cycle and ensuring compound consistency for high-performance tires.
path: Smart Tire Production/Mixing Department/Mixer Gamma
full_text: Mixer Gamma - A Banbury-type internal mixer, specifically designed for blending complex rubber compounds with various additives. Operates under high shear and temperature, crucial for achieving desired material properties. Features advanced sensor arrays for real-time monitoring of temperature, pressure, and power consumption, enabling precise control over the mixing cycle and ensuring compound consistency for high-performance tires.

name: Logistics AGV 202
description: An autonomous guided vehicle responsible for transporting 'green tires' from the building machines to the curing presses. Equipped with lidar navigation, safety scanners, and a custom gripper system to handle delicate green tires without deformation. Operates 24/7 on a predefined route, optimizing internal logistics and reducing human intervention in material handling. Battery-powered with automated charging stations.
path: Smart Tire Production/Logistics/Logistics AGV 202
full_text: Logistics AGV 202 - An autonomous guided vehicle responsible for transporting 'green tires' from the building machines to the curing presses. Equipped with lidar navigation, safety scanners, and a custom gripper system to handle delicate green tires without deformation. Operates 24/7 on a predefined route, optimizing internal logistics and reducing human intervention in material handling. Battery-powered with automated charging stations.

path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Tire Production Line 3
full_text: Production Line 3 - Dedicated line for specialized tire types, such as off-road or industrial. Features custom tooling and slower cycle times to accommodate complex designs. Optimized for flexibility over high volume.

name: Mixing Department Main
description: The heart of raw material preparation, responsible for compounding various rubber types and additives. This continuous process involves Banbury mixers and calenders, precisely controlling temperature and shear to achieve desired material properties. Key physics include rheology and polymer chain cross-linking, impacting final tire performance and durability.
path: Smart Tire Production/Mixing Department
full_text: Mixing Department Main - The heart of raw material preparation, responsible for compounding various rubber types and additives. This continuous process involves Banbury mixers and calenders, precisely controlling temperature and shear to achieve desired material properties. Key physics include rheology and polymer chain cross-linking, impacting final tire performance and durability.

name: Logistics Distribution Center
description: Manages the flow of raw materials into the factory and finished products out to customers globally. Utilizes advanced warehouse management systems (WMS) and a fleet of AGVs and forklifts for efficient internal material handling. Process types include inbound receiving, inventory management, order fulfillment, and outbound shipping, optimized for just-in-time delivery and reduced holding costs.
path: Smart Tire Production/Logistics
full_text: Logistics Distribution Center - Manages the flow of raw materials into the factory and finished products out to customers globally. Utilizes advanced warehouse management systems (WMS) and a fleet of AGVs and forklifts for efficient internal material handling. Process types include inbound receiving, inventory management, order fulfillment, and outbound shipping, optimized for just-in-time delivery and reduced holding costs.
